levels.title: Lava Survival
levels.subtitle: Keep moving
levels.feature: Touched tiles blink red, then fall away.
rules: Leave blinking tiles before they drop.
Two seconds in a pit ends the run.

levels.title: Hex-A-Fall
levels.subtitle: Claim the floor before it disappears
levels.feature: Random tiles blink red, then fall away.
rules: Touch new floor tiles for points.
Two seconds in a pit ends the run.

levels.title: Snake
levels.subtitle: Chase the flashing food
levels.feature: Each food pickup raises a wall and drops a floor tile.
rules: Each food adds a green wall and red pit.
Two seconds in a red pit ends the run.

levels.title: Food Frenzy
levels.subtitle: Clear an ever-growing feast
levels.feature: Each round adds another flashing food tile.
rules: Collect blue food on the yellow floor.
Clear levels before time runs out.

levels.title: Maze
levels.subtitle: Race through the shifting maze
levels.feature: Green gates move on a timer. Cross while flat.
rules: Follow orange from cyan to magenta.
Green walls and gates move every 2.5 seconds.
Reach magenta as fast as possible.
Two seconds in a red pit ends the run.
levels.kenLine: Timing puzzle! Green gates cycle every few seconds — roll on the orange beat.
levels.trollLine: Dance, little prisoner! The floor moves when I say so.
